features.title: Why OptRouter
features.subtitle: One API for all AI models. Focus on building, not managing integrations.
features.item0Desc: Auto-select the best model with fallback. Route by latency, cost or performance for high availability.
features.item1Desc: Drop-in OpenAI API format. Works with OpenAI SDK, LangChain, LlamaIndex and more.
features.item2Desc: One API for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta and 50+ top AI models. One key to manage.
features.item3Desc: Rust-powered gateway with streaming and high concurrency. Sub-50ms latency.
features.item4Desc: Usage stats, cost analysis and performance metrics. Single bill for all AI spend.
features.item5Desc: API key management, access control, data isolation. Enterprise-ready, self-hostable.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about OptRouter
faq.q0: How is OptRouter different from calling OpenAI directly?
faq.a0: OptRouter is fully OpenAI API compatible—just change baseURL. On top of that you get smart routing, auto fallback, unified billing and usage stats to cut cost and improve reliability.
faq.a1: OpenAI (GPT-4o, GPT-4 Turbo, etc.), Anthropic (Claude 3.5 Sonnet, etc.), Google (Gemini Pro), DeepSeek, Qwen and more. We keep adding providers and models.
faq.a2: After signup you get an API key. Replace baseURL in your code with OptRouter’s endpoint and you’re done—under 30 seconds.
faq.a3: Pay per use; prices vary by model. View usage and costs in the dashboard. Free credits on signup, no credit card required.
faq.a4: We don’t store your conversations; requests are forwarded over encrypted channels. API keys are hashed; we support enterprise access control and data isolation.
faq.a5: The gateway picks the best provider and model by availability, latency and cost. If one fails, it automatically falls back so your service stays up.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Sign up free and get $5 credit. No credit card. Cancel anytime.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Leave your phone number and requirements. We'll get back to you with integration advice, evaluation, and pricing support.
contact.point0: Private deployment / API gateway customization / provider onboarding
contact.point1: Help migrate existing OpenAI SDK / LangChain integrations
contact.point2: Enterprise-grade permissions, audit, billing, and risk control
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us your scenario, expected volume, and desired models/providers
contact.tip: By submitting, you agree we may contact you for business communication only.
contact.errorNetwork: Network error. Please try again later.

codeExample.title: Integrate in minutes
codeExample.subtitle: Fully OpenAI API compatible—just change baseURL to OptRouter. Works with OpenAI SDK, LangChain, LlamaIndex and more.
codeExample.subtitleNote: Example uses placeholder URL; for local dev use
codeExample.subtitleNoteEnd: , replace with your gateway URL in production.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: What users say about OptRouter
testimonials.card0Content: OptRouter made our AI integration simple—just change the baseURL to access all models. Smart routing cut our costs by 30%.
testimonials.card1Content: Managing API keys and billing across multiple AI vendors was a pain. With OptRouter, unified management and billing cut our ops work in half.
testimonials.card2Content: We went from landing to production in half a day. Clear docs and API compatibility. Auto failover greatly improved our stability.
testimonials.card3Content: We use GPT-4o and Claude; we used to maintain two SDKs. With OptRouter we have one codebase—much cleaner.
testimonials.card4Content: Smart routing is the killer feature—it picks the best value model for the job. Same quality, lower cost. Highly recommend!
testimonials.card5Content: The usage dashboard is very clear—we see exactly how much each model is used and what it costs. Support is responsive too.
testimonials.card6Content: Free credits on signup, fast API. As a solo dev, having one API for all major models is a game-changer.
testimonials.card7Content: High availability is key for us. OptRouter's auto failover took our SLA from 99.5% to 99.95%. Ops is much easier.
testimonials.card8Content: In healthcare we switch models often for experiments. OptRouter's single API removed a lot of integration work—big efficiency gain.
testimonials.card9Content: Zero-friction onboarding—change baseURL in the OpenAI SDK and you're done. Streaming works great, same smooth UX.

docs.gatewayIntro: OptRouter Gateway is an OpenAI-compatible gateway; set base_url to the gateway address to connect.
docs.authDesc: All requests must include an API Key in the Header:
docs.apiKeyCreateHint: Create API Keys in the console under API Keys; format starts with sk-.
docs.modelDesc: Model name; physical or virtual tier: eco/balanced/premium/code/reasoning/longctx/auto
docs.messagesDesc: Messages array with role (system/user/assistant) and content
docs.streamDesc: true for SSE stream, false for full JSON
docs.smartRoutingDesc: Set model to a tier name for automatic model selection:
docs.strategyHint: Or add header X-Opt-Strategy: intelligent to allow downgrade for simple tasks.
docs.err401Suggestion: Check Authorization header and key format
docs.err403Suggestion: Create a new API Key in console
docs.err400Suggestion: Check model, messages and required fields
docs.err402Suggestion: Top up in console and retry
docs.err429Suggestion: Retry after a short delay (exponential backoff)
docs.retrySuggestion: For 429/502, implement retry with exponential backoff (e.g. 1s, 2s, 4s).

promo.step1Desc: Register for free and get your invite code
promo.step2Desc: Send your invite link via WeChat, social media, or any platform
promo.step3Desc: When a friend registers via your link and tops up, you get ¥20
promo.shareDesc: Pick your way to share — copy and send
promo.rule1: ¥20 balance reward for each friend who registers and completes first top-up
promo.rule2: No limit on invites or total rewards
promo.rule3: Rewards credit in real time; use for API calls
promo.rule4: Friend must register via your invite link or code
promo.rule5: Only the first top-up per friend counts; no repeat rewards
promo.faq1Q: When do I get the reward?
promo.faq1A: ¥20 is credited to your balance as soon as your friend completes their first top-up; no review.
promo.faq2Q: Is there a cap on invites?
promo.faq2A: No cap. Invite as many as you like; you get ¥20 for each friend’s first top-up.
promo.faq3A: Rewards are added as balance for API usage; withdrawal is not supported.
promo.faq4Q: How much must a friend top up to trigger the reward?
promo.faq4A: Any amount for their first top-up triggers the reward; no minimum.
promo.faq5Q: Where can I see invite history and rewards?
promo.faq5A: After login, go to the Invite page to see total invites, total rewards, and details.
promo.faq6Q: What API formats does OptRouter support?
promo.faq6A: Fully OpenAI API compatible; works with OpenAI SDK, Ollama, LangChain, etc. Change one baseURL to migrate.
